query: Scatter plot the xView1 images in Kaohsiung, Taiwan from June 2017. I want to make sure that you consider a wide area

task0.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset specifically from Kaohsiung, Taiwan in June 2017, ensuring it covers a wide area.

task1.objective: Process the fetched xView1 images to prepare data for scatter plotting.

task2.objective: Create a scatter plot from the processed xView1 images data showing results visually.
